name: netbird
description: A Pulumi package for creating and managing netbird cloud resources.
attribution: This Pulumi package is based on the [`netbird` Terraform Provider](https://github.com/netbirdio/terraform-provider-netbird).

nodejs.packageDescription: A Pulumi package for creating and managing netbird cloud resources.
nodejs.readme:
> This provider is a derived work of the [Terraform Provider](https://github.com/netbirdio/terraform-provider-netbird)
> distributed under [MPL 2.0](https://www.mozilla.org/en-US/MPL/2.0/). If you encounter a bug or missing feature,
> first check the [`pulumi-netbird` repo](https://github.com/KitStream/netbird-pulumi-provider/issues); however, if that doesn't turn up anything,
> please consult the source [`terraform-provider-netbird` repo](https://github.com/netbirdio/terraform-provider-netbird/issues).

python.readme:
> This provider is a derived work of the [Terraform Provider](https://github.com/netbirdio/terraform-provider-netbird)
> distributed under [MPL 2.0](https://www.mozilla.org/en-US/MPL/2.0/). If you encounter a bug or missing feature,
> first check the [`pulumi-netbird` repo](https://github.com/KitStream/netbird-pulumi-provider/issues); however, if that doesn't turn up anything,
> please consult the source [`terraform-provider-netbird` repo](https://github.com/netbirdio/terraform-provider-netbird/issues).

managementUrl.description: NetBird Management API URL, can be also set through NB_MANAGEMENT_URL Environment Variable, value defined in Terraform files takes precedence

tenantAccount.description: Account ID to impersonate, can be also set through NB_ACCOUNT Environment Variable, value defined in Terraform files takes precedence

token.description: Admin PAT for NetBird Management Server, can be also set through NB_PAT Environment Variable, value defined in Terraform files takes precedence

authorizedGroups.description: Map of source group IDs to a list of local users authorized for SSH access. Keys must be group IDs present in `sources`. If not set, all local users are permitted. Only applicable when protocol is `netbird-ssh`.

destinationResource.description: Policy Rule Destination Resource (mutually exclusive with destinations)

destinations.description: Policy Rule Destination Groups (mutually exclusive with destination_resource)

portRanges.description: Policy Rule Port Ranges (mutually exclusive with ports)

ports.description: Policy Rule Ports (mutually exclusive with port_ranges)

sourceResource.description: Policy Rule Source Resource (mutually exclusive with sources)

sources.description: Policy Rule Source Groups (mutually exclusive with source_resource)

distributionGroups.description: List of group IDs that can use bearer auth

host.description: Backend IP or domain for this target. If omitted, the API resolves it from the target peer.

path.description: URL path prefix for this target. Defaults to "/" if omitted.

port.description: Backend port for this target (0 for scheme default)

protocol.description: Protocol to use when connecting to the backend (http, https)

authorizedGroups.description: Map of source group IDs to a list of local users authorized for SSH access. Keys must be group IDs present in `sources`. If not set, all local users are permitted. Only applicable when protocol is `netbird-ssh`.

destinations.description: Policy Rule Destination Groups (mutually exclusive with destination_resource)

portRanges.description: Policy Rule Port Ranges (mutually exclusive with ports)

ports.description: Policy Rule Ports (mutually exclusive with port_ranges)

sourceResource.description: Policy Rule Source Resource (mutually exclusive with sources)

sources.description: Policy Rule Source Groups (mutually exclusive with source_resource)

address.description: Cluster address used for CNAME targets

connectedProxies.description: Number of proxy nodes connected in this cluster

distributionGroups.description: List of group IDs that can use bearer auth

path.description: URL path prefix for this target

protocol.description: Protocol to use when connecting to the backend (http, https)

provider.description:
The provider type for the netbird package. By default, resources use package-wide configuration
settings, however an explicit `Provider` instance may be created and passed during resource
construction to achieve fine-grained programmatic control over provider settings. See the
[documentation](https://www.pulumi.com/docs/reference/programming-model/#providers) for more information.

managementUrl.description: NetBird Management API URL, can be also set through NB_MANAGEMENT_URL Environment Variable, value defined in Terraform files takes precedence

tenantAccount.description: Account ID to impersonate, can be also set through NB_ACCOUNT Environment Variable, value defined in Terraform files takes precedence

token.description: Admin PAT for NetBird Management Server, can be also set through NB_PAT Environment Variable, value defined in Terraform files takes precedence

managementUrl.description: NetBird Management API URL, can be also set through NB_MANAGEMENT_URL Environment Variable, value defined in Terraform files takes precedence

tenantAccount.description: Account ID to impersonate, can be also set through NB_ACCOUNT Environment Variable, value defined in Terraform files takes precedence

token.description: Admin PAT for NetBird Management Server, can be also set through NB_PAT Environment Variable, value defined in Terraform files takes precedence

autoUpdateVersion.description: Set Clients auto-update version. "latest", "disabled", or a specific version (e.g "0.64.5")

dnsDomain.description: Allows to define a custom DNS domain for the account

groupsPropagationEnabled.description: Allows propagate the new user auto groups to peers that belongs to the user

jwtAllowGroups.description: List of groups to which users are allowed access

jwtGroupsClaimName.description: Name of the claim from which we extract groups names to add it to account groups.

jwtGroupsEnabled.description: Allows extract groups from JWT claim and add it to account groups.

lazyConnectionEnabled.description: Enables or disables experimental lazy connection

networkRange.description: Allows to define a custom network range for the account in CIDR format

networkTrafficLogsEnabled.description: Enables or disables network traffic logging. If enabled, all network traffic events from peers will be stored.

networkTrafficLogsGroups.description: Limits traffic logging to these groups. If unset all peers are enabled.

networkTrafficPacketCounterEnabled.description: Enables or disables network traffic packet counter. If enabled, network packets and their size will be counted and reported. (This can have an slight impact on performance)

peerApprovalEnabled.description: (Cloud only) Enables or disables peer approval globally. If enabled, all peers added will be in pending state until approved by an admin.

peerExposeEnabled.description: Enables or disables peer expose. If enabled, peers can expose local services through the reverse proxy using the CLI.

peerExposeGroups.description: Limits which peer groups are allowed to expose services. If empty, all peers are allowed when peer expose is enabled.

peerInactivityExpiration.description: Period of time of inactivity after which peer session expires (seconds).

peerInactivityExpirationEnabled.description: Enables or disables peer inactivity expiration globally. After peer's session has expired the user has to log in (authenticate). Applies only to peers that were added by a user (interactive SSO login).

peerLoginExpiration.description: Period of time after which peer login expires (seconds).

peerLoginExpirationEnabled.description: Enables or disables peer login expiration globally. After peer's login has expired the user has to log in (authenticate). Applies only to peers that were added by a user (interactive SSO login).

regularUsersViewBlocked.description: Allows blocking regular users from viewing parts of the system.

routingPeerDnsResolutionEnabled.description: Enables or disables DNS resolution on the routing peers

userApprovalRequired.description: Enables manual approval for new users joining via domain matching. When enabled, users are blocked with pending approval status until explicitly approved by an admin.

content.description: DNS record content (IP address for A/AAAA, domain for CNAME)

zoneId.description: DNS Zone ID that this record belongs to

pulumi:providers:netbird/terraformConfig.description: This function returns a Terraform config object with terraform-namecased keys,to be used with the Terraform Module Provider.
